title: Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Gamora {{!}} Cosmic Time Heist}} {{Otheruses|Gamora}} {{CharHub|Gamora|Gamora}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Cosmic Time Heist Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |name = Gamora |image = Gamora2014Infobox.png |real name = Gamora {{Conjecture|Zen Whoberi Ben Titan}} |species = [[Zehoberei]] ([[Cyborg]]) |gender = Female |affiliation = {{Affiliation|RVG}}
*{{Affiliation|URVG}}
{{Affiliation|GOTG3}} (formerly) |movie = {{Infobox List|''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]''
{{Collapse|''[[The Marvels]]'' (depiction)}}}} |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Ms. Marvel (TV series)|Ms. Marvel]]'' (depiction)
''[[Secret Invasion (TV series)|Secret Invasion]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Gamora (Legends)|Gamora]]'' |actor = [[Zoe Saldaña]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You know I'm still not [[Gamora|who]] you want me to be."
"I know, but who you are ain't so bad.|Gamora and [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} '''Gamora {{Conjecture|Zen Whoberi Ben Titan}}''' is a [[Zehoberei]] assassin adopted by [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] and raised alongside [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]]. In her [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|timeline]], the [[Time Heist]] orchestrated by the [[Avengers]] who had come from a different reality inadvertently enabled Gamora and Thanos to learn how the future could unfold. Acting upon the obtained intelligence, Thanos brought his armies through the [[Multiverse]] from his reality to the Avengers' prime timeline. Gamora then turned against him, helping the Avengers and their allies to defeat him. Having witnessed Thanos and his army turn to dust, Gamora, now stranded in a different universe than her own, left [[Earth]] and joined the [[United Ravagers]]. [[2026|Three years later]], Gamora reunited with [[Nebula]] and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] and aided them in infiltrating [[OrgoCorp]] in order to save [[Rocket]]'s life. [[Peter Quill]], the lover of her [[Gamora|alternate self]], kept attempting to trigger a relationship with her, much to her irritation. As the Guardians headed to [[Counter-Earth]] in order to confront [[High Evolutionary]], Gamora joined the Guardians and fought alongside them. Having defeated High Evolutionary and liberated his test subjects, Gamora departed from the Guardians and made amends with Quill before she returned to her position among the [[Ravagers]]. ==Biography== ===Leaving Her Timeline=== ====Meeting Another Nebula==== [[File:THPS42.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora witnesses [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]]'s neural drive glitching]] {{Quote|I don't understand. [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Two]] [[Nebula]]s."
"No. The same Nebula. From two different times.|Gamora and [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]]|Avengers: Endgame}} Gamora and [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]] reunited with [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] on a [[Q-Ship]] and were informed that he was preparing to send them to the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' under the orders of [[Ronan the Accuser/Cosmic Time Heist|Ronan the Accuser]] to get the [[Power Stone]]. Gamora noted that Ronan will not be pleased with her and Nebula being assigned to him, but Thanos brushed it off, saying that Ronan's only alternative was death and that his obsession with the [[Kree-Nova War|war]] was clouding his judgement. Nebula promised that she would not fail Thanos while Gamora only rolled her eyes in annoyance. [[File:THPS43.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora being ordered to escort [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]]]] Suddenly, Nebula's synaptic drive started to glitch and showed a hologram of [[War Machine]] and [[Nebula|another Nebula]] on [[Morag]]. Gamora then interrogated Nebula as to who that was in the hologram, to which she claimed not to know. Gamora assumed that her synaptic drive was damaged in the battle, but Thanos ordered her to be examined by [[Ebony Maw/Cosmic Time Heist|Ebony Maw]] on the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' to figure out the cause of her discrepancy. As she was examined by Maw, he realized through examining the file that another consciousness was sharing Nebula's network, claiming there to be two Nebula's, with one having travelled from [[2023|another timeline]]. [[File:Thanos-Maw-Gamora-CheckNebulasHead.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora watches [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]] being analyzed]] Watching through Nebula's files, Gamora and Thanos saw the group of [[Humans|Terrans]], whom Thanos recognized as the [[Avengers]], before noticing that another Nebula was among them. They kept looking through the recordings, as Thanos realized that in the other timeline, [[Thanos|he]] successfully collected the [[Infinity Stones]] and [[Snap|destroyed]] the half of the universe's population, while another Nebula and the Avengers tried to undo his actions. In addition, Thanos also watched an archived memory of his him being [[Ambush on Thanos|killed]] by [[Thor]] after which he revealed that he destroyed the Stones. This action unsettled Gamora, while Thanos gave Nebula the chance to prove her loyalty to him when Maw had attempted to execute her, believing that she betrayed his cause.{{Ref|AE}} ====Switching Sides==== [[File:Gamora (2023).png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora is brought to the [[2023|main universe]]]] {{Quote|Tell me something. In the future, what happens to you and [[Gamora|me]]?"
"I tried to [[Skirmish on Knowhere|kill you]]. [[Battle of Xandar|Several]] [[Attack on Gamora|times]]. But eventually, we become close, we become friends. We become sisters."
"Come on. We can stop [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|him]].|Gamora and [[Nebula]]|Avengers: Endgame}} Having examined her memories, [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] instructed [[Ebony Maw/Cosmic Time Heist|Ebony Maw]] to travel to [[Morag]] so he could [[Kidnapping of Nebula|abduct]] the other universe's [[Nebula]]. Once Nebula was captured, she attempted to turn Gamora against Thanos early by telling her that her universe's [[Thanos]] found the [[Soul Stone]], cryptically alluding to the fact that he had [[Sacrifice of Gamora|killed]] her [[Gamora|alternate counterpart]] to obtain it. [[File:2014 Gamora in 2023.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora asks [[Nebula]] about their future]] However, Nebula was silenced by her alternate self who removed her superficial armor plate to resemble her and left to bring them to the main universe. They were then transported through the [[Quantum Realm]] to the main universe. After witnessing the [[Attack on the Avengers Compound|destruction]] of the [[Avengers Compound]], Gamora, considering Nebula's cryptic message on how Thanos obtained the Soul Stone, visited her to ask her about their relationship in the future. [[File:Gamora (Avengers Endgame).png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora decides to free [[Nebula]]]] Nebula opened up to her, admitting to the fact that she tried to kill her on dozens of occasions such as during the [[Skirmish on Knowhere]], the [[Battle of Xandar]], and [[Attack on Gamora|attacked]] her on [[Ego]]'s planet in her universe. As Gamora looked away, Nebula revealed that the two ultimately became close sisters in the end. Upon hearing this and realizing how much she cared about her counterpart from her timeline, Gamora freed Nebula, telling her that they could still stop Thanos from destroying her universe.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Battle of Earth]]==== [[File:EgDkMUZ.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora defects and stops [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]]]] {{Quote|[[Star-Lord|This]] is the one? Seriously?"
"The choices were him, or a [[Groot|tree]].|Gamora and [[Nebula]]|Avengers: Endgame}} [[Nebula]] and Gamora left the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' and came to rescue [[Hawkeye]] in the ruins of the [[Avengers Compound]], who was nearly killed by [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]], who already retrieved the [[Nano Gauntlet]]. Gamora tried to convince her to change sides, claiming that she could change and be a better person. She refused, citing that Thanos wouldn't allow her to change, and attempted to shoot Gamora. However, Nebula was instead shot dead by her alternate self. [[File:Star-Lord meets another Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora encounters a confused [[Star-Lord]]]] During the [[Battle of Earth|battle]], Gamora saved [[Star-Lord]], who was being overpowered by a pair of [[Sakaarans]]. Quill, surprised and shocked, mistook her for the [[Gamora]] he knew, believing her to have been alive. As he prepared to caress her face, she kicked him in the groin twice while warning him not to touch her as she had not encountered him before. Having learned of their relationship, Gamora was left incredulous that she chose Quill in the original timeline, leading Nebula to comment that it was a choice between Quill and [[Groot]]. [[File:''Marvel ladies''.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora assists [[Captain Marvel]] in battle]] Later in the battle, when [[Captain Marvel]] had arrived to participate in the battle and was tasked with returning the [[Infinity Stones]] to a [[Quantum Tunnel]] in [[Luis' Van|Luis' van]], Gamora, along with Nebula, [[Mantis]], [[Wanda Maximoff]], [[Shuri]], [[Okoye]], [[Valkyrie]], [[Pepper Potts]], and [[Wasp]], assisted her in fighting the hordes of Thanos' army. As they cleared a path for her, Gamora slashed a [[Chitauri Gorillas|Chitauri Gorilla]] along the way. However, they watched as Thanos destroyed the van with his [[Double-Edged Sword]]. [[File:2014 Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora leaves after the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] is won]] Ultimately, the battle came to an end when [[Iron Man]] obtained the [[Infinity Stones]] and used them to wipe out Thanos and his army at the cost of his own life.{{Ref|AE}} Gamora observed as her newfound allies knelt to respect Stark's death. Electing not to follow their action as she wasn't familiar with anyone there, Gamora walked away.{{Ref|AEDS}} As Gamora had been wounded during the battle, she spilled her blood on the battlefield, which was collected by [[Nick Fury]]'s secret [[Skrull]] unit and placed into a vial known as the [[Harvest]] alongside other enhanced DNA samples. The Harvest vial was later administered by Super-Skrulls [[Gravik]] and [[G'iah]], granting them access to Gamora's physiology and abilities.{{Ref|SI105}}{{Ref|SI106}} Additionally, Gamora's short time on [[Earth]] resulted in the citizens learning of her existence, and she was featured at the [[New Jersey AvengerCon]].{{Ref|MM101}} ====Joining the United Ravagers==== {{Quote|So, you're a Ravager now?|[[Peter Quill]] to Gamora|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Sometime after the [[Battle of Earth]], Gamora joined the [[United Ravagers]] and became quite close to them and considered them her new family, with her being one of the leaders of the United Ravagers alongside [[Stakar Ogord]].{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Reunion with the Guardians=== ====Helping the Guardians==== [[File:Gamora and the Guys.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora and the [[United Ravagers|Ravagers]] board the ''[[Bowie]]'']] {{Quote|That person was some alternate future version of me. It wasn't me."
"We loved each other.|Gamora and [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Gamora remained in touch with [[Nebula]] and was contacted by her in [[2026]] to help the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] break into the [[Orgoscope]] to save [[Rocket]], offering to pay her a hundred thousand units. Gamora accepted, and the [[United Ravagers]] boarded the Guardians' [[Bowie|ship]] when they arrived at the met up. As the Guardians were given uniforms and informed on the plan, [[Peter Quill]] tried to talk to Gamora, but she rejected him, not remembering who he was. [[File:Quill and Alt Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora tells [[Peter Quill]] she's not [[Gamora]]]] Donning spacesuits, Gamora joined Quill, Nebula, [[Drax the Destroyer]] and [[Mantis]] on the mission, exiting the ship and landing on the Orgoscope. As they waited for Nebula to create an entry for them, Quill again tried to talk to Gamora, asking what she remembered about them. Gamora explained to Quill that the [[Gamora|person]] he was referring to wasn't her, but he continued to express how much he loved her and hoped that there was a chance for them to get back together, but she told him there wasn't.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Infiltrating the Orgoscope==== [[File:Guardians discovered.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] in [[Orgoscope]]]] {{Quote|Except, I didn't form the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]. And I barely left [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]]. [[Gamora|Whoever]] it was that you were in love with, it wasn't me.|Gamora to [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] made their way inside the [[Orgoscope]], only to be quickly found by Master [[Karja]], but they were able to maintain their cover. Gamora then gave orders to the Guardians, splitting them up so that she, [[Peter Quill]] and [[Nebula]] would get the passkey, while [[Drax the Destroyer]] and [[Mantis]] accessed the spaceport so they could escape, having lost their spacesuits. [[File:Gamora insulted by Quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora becomes frustrated with [[Peter Quill]]]] The three came across [[Ura]], who Quill tried to charm for information, but Gamora decided to interrupt and aggressively forced Ura at gunpoint to take them to the files. As Ura brought them [[Rocket]]'s file, Gamora and Quill argued over her actions, with Quill comparing her to his [[Gamora]], which frustrated her. They obtained the file, but as they went to leave, they were surrounded by guards. Gamora used Ura as a hostage to allow them to escape into an elevator, where Quill unloaded all of his history with the two Gamoras to Ura. [[File:Mantis, Drax, Gamora & Star-Lord.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] escape]] Exiting the elevator, the three discovered Drax and Mantis fighting against the guards, so Gamora and Quill, with Ura still as their hostage, rushed to the security hub. Gamora immediately shot [[Kwol]] in the leg, despite her surrendering, causing Quill to call out her quickness to violence. Quill was able to hack the [[Orgosentries]]' suits so that they would uncontrollably float, ending the fight. They regrouped with the rest of the Guardians and made their way to the ''[[Bowie]],'' with Gamora and Mantis helping Drax walk.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Visiting Counter-Earth==== [[File:Gamora explaining.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora talks about the [[High Evolutionary]]]] {{Quote|Listen, I know you were always looking for a family. Okay? But my [[Gamora]], the one I loved, she didn't find it with a [[Ravagers|group of criminals]], she found it with [[Guardians of the Galaxy|us]]. People who care about you. I know that's who you still are. Somewhere inside of you..."
"What are you so afraid of in your self that I need to be something for you? I don't give a shit about your Gamora. Life made me me!|[[Peter Quill]] and Gamora|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} In the ''[[Bowie]]'', Gamora and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] viewed [[Rocket]]'s file which revealed the experimentation and torture he underwent. However, the override code to deactivate Rocket's kill switch had been deleted by [[Theel]], who Gamora knew worked for the [[High Evolutionary]], and she proceed to explain who he was. When [[Groot]] spoke, Gamora was confused how the others understood him, only hearing "I am Groot." [[File:Gamora looks at Quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora gets angry and attacks [[Peter Quill]]]] The Guardians found the High Evolutionary's coordinates, so they decided to track him down and recover the code. Gamora objected, as she knew it was a trap for them to bring Rocket right to the High Evolutionary, but they ignored her. Gamora demanded that the Guardians drop her off with the [[United Ravagers|Ravagers]], but they didn't have time. Quill then began to tell Gamora that the Ravagers weren't her family, but the Guardians could be. Angered by this, and being compared to a [[Gamora|different person]], Gamora attacked Quill, but was stopped by [[Nebula]]. Gamora then stormed off. [[File:Gamora holds Polaroid.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora looking at [[Peter Quill]]'s polaroid]] Gamora secretly made contact with [[Fitz-Gibbonok]] to have the Ravagers pick her up, and she sent her coordinates, unaware that it was [[Ayesha]] who answered. Arriving at [[Counter-Earth]], Gamora stayed in the ship as the Guardians went to retrieve the code. While waiting, Gamora wandered around the ship, checking on Rocket, using the [[Star-Lord's Zune|Zune]], and looking through Quill's childhood backpack. As Gamora was using the toilet, an alarm went off, so she went to investigate. [[File:Gamora carrying Rocket.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora saves [[Rocket]] from [[Adam Warlock|Adam]]]] Gamora found Rocket being taken by [[War Pig]], so she pointed her gun and ordered her to drop Rocket. War Pig cooperated, but managed to catch Gamora off guard by flying straight at her and slammed her into the wall. Gamora chased after War Pig and attacked her from behind, but was unable to defeat her. As Gamora was about to be killed by War Pig, she was saved when [[Adam Warlock]] arrived and tackled War Pig. As the two foes argued, Gamora used it as a opportunity to escape, so she grabbed Rocket and ran away. [[File:Gamora piloting.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora struggling to pilot the ''[[Bowie]]'']] Suddenly, Counter-Earth began to be bombed, so Gamora rushed back inside the ''Bowie'', where she found a scared [[Blurp]]. The explosions knocked Gamora across the ship, and when she looked up, she saw Adam Warlock before her, but he passed out, so she restrained him. Nebula contacted Gamora and told her to take off, but she didn't know how to fly the ''Bowie''. Gamora was able to get it in the air, but could not control the ship and was about to crash into Quill and Groot. However, she managed to break just in time before killing them. [[File:Gamora Vol. 3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora relieved [[Rocket]] survived]] Quill and Groot entered, took control from Gamora and flew them away from Counter-Earth as it was destroyed. Once they were safe, they rushed to Rocket to enter the passkey to disable his kill switch. At first it didn't work and Rocket died, but they were able to revive him, and Gamora was moved by watching as Quill and Groot hugged Rocket. They then made contact with Nebula, [[Drax the Destroyer]] and [[Mantis]], who were all inside [[Arête Laboratories]] and captured by the High Evolutionary, who demanded Rocket be brought to him.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Attack on Arête Laboratories|Fighting the High Evolutionary]]==== [[File:Gamora yelling at groot.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora joins the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]]] {{Quote|If [[Guardians of the Galaxy|we]] wanna live, we have to leave now. This whole [[Arête Laboratories|rig]] is gonna go down any second."
"[[Star Children|They]] will all die if we don't help them.|Gamora and [[Nebula]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] prepared to rescue [[Nebula]], [[Drax the Destroyer]] and [[Mantis]], although Gamora suggested just giving [[Rocket]] over to the [[High Evolutionary]]. Groot spoke to Gamora, but she once again only heard "I am Groot." [[Star-Lord]] told Gamora she could stay behind, but she joined them to save her sister. Gamora then gave Star-Lord the polaroid of him with his family. [[File:Star-Lord, Gamora & Blurp.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora and [[Blurp]] are saved by [[Star-Lord]]]] Gamora stayed with Star-Lord in the cockpit of the ''[[Bowie]]'', while Rocket and Groot split off in two ships, and they all headed for [[Arête Laboratories]]. As they approached, [[Adam Warlock]] flew into Gamora and Star-Lord's ship, causing it to spiral. Gamora took [[Blurp]] as hostage, stopping Adam from attacking, and the ship crashed inside Arête Laboratories. Star-Lord dove to get him and Gamora, along with Blurp, out of the ship, having programmed the self destruct sequence to defeat Adam. [[File:GOTG Volume 3 Super Bowl Trailer (4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora decides to save the [[Star Children]]]] They were joined by Rocket and Groot, and they went to rescue the others, but at that moment, they were reunited with Nebula, Drax and Mantis, who were riding on [[Abilisks]]. Before they could leave, Mantis revealed that there were [[Star Children|children]] imprisoned that they needed to save. Gamora voiced that they would die if they stayed on the ship, but Nebula insisted that they needed to save the children. Whilst they argued, Rocket went off to save them, so all the other Guardians followed, including Gamora, albeit somewhat reluctantly. [[File:Guardians won the fight.png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] defeat all of their enemies]] They entered a hallway that was filled with the High Evolutionary's guards and [[Hell Spawn]], and as a team, they managed to successfully defeat every single enemy. Star-Lord made a plan for them to connect the hole in Arête Laboratories to [[Knowhere]], so Rocket and Nebula went to pilot the ship while the other rescued the children. After freeing them from their cages, they were able to get all the children onto Knowhere, but they noticed Rocket hadn't come back, so all the Guardians went to find him before the ship exploded. [[File:Gamora ripping he face.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora rips off [[High Evolutionary]]'s mask]] The Guardians found Rocket in a fight with the High Evolutionary, so they joined in, with each member landing a solid blow. Gamora stabbed the High Evolutionary with her sword, and holding him by the throat, she peeled off his mask, exposing his disfigured face as he fell to the floor. Rocket chose to spare the High Evolutionary, and informed the Guardians about the animals onboard, so they rushed to save them all right as the ship was exploding. They all managed to return to Knowhere, and Gamora watched as the Guardians all hugged, but did not join in.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Leaving the Guardians==== [[File:Gamora understands Groot.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora is finally able to understand [[Groot]]]] {{Quote|I am Groot."
"Yeah. It was good working with you, too.|[[Groot]] and Gamora|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Gamora contacted the [[United Ravagers]] to pick her up from [[Knowhere]], and as she waited, she calmly watched all the citizens. When the Ravagers arrived, Groot informed her, which she was able to understand. Groot told Gamora it was good working with her, and she returned the sentiment. [[File:Gamora in Knowhere.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora saying goodbye to [[Peter Quill]]]] Gamora headed to the ship, where [[Martinex]] and [[Mainframe]] were waiting for her. Before leaving, Gamora spoke to [[Peter Quill]], letting him know that she still wasn't the [[Gamora|person]] he wanted her to be, but he had now finally accepted that and was happy with who she was. As she walked by him, Gamora stopped to remark that she imagined that they were fun together, which gave Quill comfort, as he told her they were. Although she was not his Gamora, she did feel the importance she had on Quill. [[File:Ravagers hug.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora is reunited with the [[United Ravagers|Ravagers]]]] Gamora said goodbye to [[Nebula]], with the two of them grunting at each other, as was their way of communicating. Gamora boarded the ship with Martinex and Mainframe and departed from Knowhere. They returned to the Ravagers, where Gamora was welcomed back by the crew, who were all rejoiced at seeing her back. [[Stakar Ogord]] hugged Gamora and welcomed her home, and the rest of the Ravagers all embraced her, which made her happy, as she truely had found herself a family that loved her in the Ravagers.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Zehoberei Physiology/Bionic Enhancement''': As a [[Zehoberei]], Gamora naturally possesses physical capabilities beyond any human being, which were further augmented by [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]]' use of bionic and cybernetic enhancements to improve her skills as an assassin. **'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:Gamora pushes Quill.png|thumb|250px|Gamora pushes Quill]] Due to her Zehoberei heritage and bionic enhancements, Gamora is stronger than [[Humans|humans]] and many other species, allowing her to overpower a majority of her opponents in combat. Gamora was able to throw a [[Korbinites|Korbinite]] soldier much larger than herself back a considerable distance while decimating [[Korbin]], pushed [[Star-Lord]] into the ''[[Bowie]]'''s wall breaking the ship's screens and cut [[Octo-hyena]] in half with her sword. **'''Enhanced Durability''': [[File:Gamora with Rocket Vol. 3 .png|thumb|250px|Gamora landing effortlessly while carrying Rocket]] Gamora's bionic upgrades and the advanced physiology of her species allow her to be more resistant to physical harm. Gamora is able to survive, or at least briefly endure, various afflictions that would prove fatal to a normal human being, such as severe electrocution, deep space exposure, or blunt force trauma. Gamora was able to withstand direct hits from [[Hell Spawn]]s such as [[War Pig]] and Octo-Hyena, sending her flying into walls with considerable force. While escaping from [[Adam Warlock]], Gamora fell from a considerable height while holding Rocket, got too close to an explosion unharmed, and withstood being tossed around the ''Bowie'', hitting the walls with great force after [[Counter-Earth]] began to explode. During the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Gamora took the fall when [[Star-Lord]] saved her from the exploding ship. **'''Superhuman Agility''': [[File:Gamora slaying a monster.jpeg|thumb|250px|Gamora leaping in battle]] As a bionically-Zehoberei, Gamora possesses a high level of agility that gives her an advantage over her opponents. Gamora was able to do inhuman acrobatic feats while fighting [[War Pig]] and the [[High Evolutionary]]'s [[Hell Spawn|henchmen]] in the [[Arête Laboratories]]. **'''Enhanced Stamina''': Gamora's two livers allow her to metabolize and filter toxins faster than any human and her respiratory implants allow her to intake oxygen at greater efficiency than any human.{{Ref|MSCE}} **'''Enhanced Reflexes''': Gamora's natural reflexes had been augmented by the use of nanomachines throughout her bloodstream, increasing her reaction time in combat situations.{{Ref|MSCE}} **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Bio-augmentations such as nanomachines within her bloodstream grant Gamora the power to regenerate quickly from most injuries or infections.{{Ref|MSCE}} ===Abilities=== *'''Master Combatant''': Gamora is an extremely skilled and formidable hand-to-hand combatant, having trained extensively as an assassin under [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] ever since she was a child as well as years of fighting experience when carrying out Thanos' missions, making her one of the most dangerous and best fighters in the universe, as was shown when she killed hordes of [[Korbinites|Korbinite]] soldiers while decimating [[Korbin]]. During the [[Battle of Earth]], Gamora was able to defeat dozens of [[Chitauri]] and [[Outriders]] with relative ease, as well as one much larger [[Chitauri Gorillas|Chitauri Gorilla]]. Gamora fought off multiple [[High Evolutionary]]'s soldiers, performing acrobatic movements and slashing them with her [[Godslayer|sword]]. *'''Sword Mastery''': [[File:Gamora blocking the blast.png|thumb|250px|Gamora blocking an energy blast with her sword]] Gamora is extremely skilled at using her [[Godslayer|sword]] in combat, with it being her primary method of combat. She was able to slice a Chitauri Gorilla with relative ease. In the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Gamora was able to slice several High Evolutionary's soldiers and the Hell Spawn. *'''Knife Mastery''': Gamora is a proficient knife wielder. Gamora used knives to pierce [[War Pig]]. *'''Expert Marksman''': [[File:Gamora 2023.png|thumb|250px|Gamora using a gun]] Gamora has a level of proficiency in using firearms. She displayed this skill when she effectively shot multiple enemies in [[Orgoscope]] and [[Arête Laboratories]] such as [[Kwol]] and [[High Evolutionary]]'s soldiers. Gamora has also threatened to shoot [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]] in the [[Battle of Earth]], [[Ura]] in the [[Infiltration into the Orgoscope]] and [[War Pig]] in the [[Battle of Counter-Earth]]. *'''Master Assassin''': Gamora is an extremely skilled assassin, being so great that she is known for never having failed her missions while under [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]]' tutelage and even earning such fearful reputation that she is considered the "deadliest woman in the galaxy" due to her work as an assassin. *'''Expert Thief''': As a member of the [[Ravagers]], Gamora is a highly skilled thief. *'''Pilot''': Gamora is a capable pilot, able to pilot the ''[[Bowie]]'' in the [[Battle of Counter-Earth]] and while [[Attack on Arête Laboratories|invading]] the [[Arête Laboratories]]. *'''Bilingualism''': Gamora is fluent in her native language, and she can also understand Groot after bonding with [[Groot]]. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''Handgun''': Gamora pointed a handgun towards [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|Nebula]]. *'''[[Godslayer]]''': Gamora's weapon of choice, a retractable sword. She used Godslayer to cut through many of the Hell Spawn in a hallway in [[Arête Laboratories]] and later stabbed High Evolutionary in the stomach during the Guardians’ last confrontation with him, severely wounding the latter. ===Other Equipment=== *'''Cybernetic Skeleton''': While in the service of Thanos, Gamora had cybernetic appendages such as respiratory and musculoskeletal upgrades installed in her providing enhanced strength and durability.{{Ref|MSVD}} *'''Ocular and Respiratory Implants''': Gamora had implants installed in her {{WPS|visual system}} and {{WPS|respiratory system}}, providing enhanced stamina and vision.{{Ref|MSVD}} *'''[[Translator Implant]]''': Gamora has a translator implant that helps her understand many of the languages spoken in the universe.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1639784535884984322?s=20 James Gunn on Twitter - March 25, 2023] *'''[[Space Suit]]''': A special suit used to survive in the vacuum of space. Gamora and the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the suits until [[Mantis]] accidentally threw them away. *'''[[Med-Paks|Med-Pak]]''': Gamora used a med-pak to heal [[Rocket]] in the ''[[Bowie]]''. ===Vehicles=== [[File:Gamora crashing with the Bowie.jpeg|thumb|250px|Gamora tries to fly the ''[[Bowie]]'']] *'''''[[Bowie]]''''': When initially assisting the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], Gamora worked on the ''Bowie'' during their [[Infiltration into the Orgoscope|infiltration of the Orgoscope]]. Afterwards though, Gamora was forced to stay on the ship when the Guardians continued their pursuit to grab the info to operate on [[Rocket]] on [[Counter-Earth]]. Wanting to return to the [[United Ravagers]], Gamora tried to contact [[Fitz-Gibbonok]] to retrieve her, with her waiting on the Ship as the Guardians fought the [[High Evolutionary]]. Eventually when High Evolutionary began to blow up the planet, Gamora had to fight off [[War Pig]] and [[Adam Warlock]] to protect Rocket, with her bounding Warlock and chaotically fly the ''Bowie'' to [[Star-Lord]] and [[Groot]]. Finally, when the two opperated on Rocket succesfully, Gamora joined them and [[Blurp]] to attack [[Arête Laboratories]] to rescue [[Nebula]], [[Drax the Destroyer|Drax]], and [[Mantis]], with her, Quill, and Blurp fighting an enraged Adam with Quill blowing up the pod they were flying after saving them. ==Facilities== {{Rewrite}} *'''[[Knowhere]]''': Following the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Gamora briefly stayed on the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] home world, [[Knowhere]], when they called on it to help them. Eventually, Gamora left with the [[United Ravagers]] after wishing [[Groot]] and [[Star-Lord]] goodbye. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] † - (depiction; alternate universe) ==Behind the Scenes== *Part of the reason [[Christopher Markus]] and [[Stephen McFeely]] used [[time travel]] in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'' to bring this variant of [[Gamora]] into the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] was to allow [[James Gunn]] to use her in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' if Gunn wished to.[https://comicbook.com/marvel/2019/10/25/avengers-endgame-gamora-guardians-vol-3-alive-time-travel/ Avengers: Endgame Brought Gamora Back for James Gunn's Guardians Vol. 3] *[[Ameenah Kaplan]] was a reader for the role of Gamora in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''. *[[Bethany Levy]] and [[Alicia Vela-Bailey]] were stunt doubles for [[Zoe Saldana]] in the role of Gamora. *[[Eli Logue]], [[LaNease Adams]] and [[Monica Rivera]] were stand-ins for [[Zoe Saldana]] in the role of Gamora. ==References== {{Gallery|Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Gamora}}
